studies.title: Evaluation study of digital tinnitus counseling Meine Tinnitus App
studies.brief_summary: Meine Tinnitus App represents a learning-based therapeutic approach that aims to enable patients to manage the burdensome negative consequences associated with tinnitus by informing, advising, and empowering individuals and thereby reducing the perceived impact of their condition. Adaptation of the strategies and techniques provided during tinnitus counseling support patients to reduce tinnitus-related distress and increase their quality of life. Tinnitus counselling has received substantial recognition by the medical and the scientific community and is widely recognised as a vitally important approach to tinnitus management. The current study aims to investigate the impact of tinnitus counseling administered via a digital application on tinnitus patients. To that end, the following two potential improvements (positive care effects) will be evaluated in the current study. First, a decrease of tinnitus-related distress (medical benefit). Second, an increase of patient's quality of life
